features.name: SQLite File Import
features.description: Lets users open .sqlite database files directly in Datagrok, exposing each table as a dataframe. The integration runs client-side via the sql.js WASM library with no server round-trip required.
features.evidence_summary: The single fileHandler (importSQLite), its WASM init (sqlJsInit), all three docs, and the inaugural changelog entry all describe the same capability: reading .sqlite files into the platform.
